tEn: Scaling Laws for Floating Point Quantization Training
tZh: 浮点量化训练的缩放定律
sEn: We propose a unified scaling law for floating-point quantization training, revealing optimal exponent-mantissa ratios, critical data size, and cost-performance precision between 4-8 bits.
sZh: 我们提出了浮点量化训练的统一缩放定律，揭示了最优指数-尾数比、临界数据量以及4-8位之间的最佳性价比精度。
absEn: Low-precision training is considered an effective strategy for reducing both training and downstream inference costs. Previous scaling laws for precision mainly focus on integer quantization, which pay less attention to the constituents in floating-point (FP) quantization, and thus cannot well fit the LLM losses in this scenario. In contrast, while FP quantization training is more commonly implemented in production, it's research has been relatively superficial. In this paper, we thoroughly explore the effects of FP quantization targets, exponent bits, mantissa bits, and the calculation granularity of the scaling factor in FP quantization training performance of LLM models. In addition to an accurate FP quantization unified scaling law, we also provide valuable suggestions for the community: (1) Exponent bits contribute slightly more to the model performance than mantissa bits. We provide the optimal exponent-mantissa bit ratio for different bit numbers, which is available for future reference by hardware manufacturers; (2) We discover the formation of the critical data size in low-precision LLM training. Too much training data exceeding the critical data size will inversely bring in degradation of LLM performance; (3) The optimal FP quantization precision is directly proportional to the computational power, but within a wide computational power range. We estimate that the best cost-performance precision should lie between 4-8 bits.
absZh: 低精度训练被认为是降低训练和下游推理成本的有效策略。以往的精度缩放定律主要关注整数量化，较少关注浮点量化的组成部分，因此无法很好地拟合该场景下大语言模型的损失。相比之下，浮点量化训练在生产中更常见，但其研究相对浅显。本文深入探讨了浮点量化目标、指数位、尾数位以及缩放因子计算粒度对大语言模型浮点量化训练性能的影响。除了提出准确的浮点量化统一缩放定律外，我们还为社区提供了有价值的建议：（1）指数位对模型性能的贡献略大于尾数位。我们给出了不同比特数下的最优指数-尾数比，可供硬件制造商未来参考；（2）我们发现了低精度大语言模型训练中临界数据量的形成。超过临界数据量的过多训练数据反而会导致大语言模型性能下降；（3）最优浮点量化精度与计算能力成正比，但仅限于较宽的计算能力范围内。我们估计最佳性价比精度应在4-8位之间。

contrib.en: Proposes a unified scaling law for floating-point quantization training, integrating data size, model size, exponent, mantissa, and block size.
contrib.zh: 提出了浮点量化训练的统一缩放定律，整合了数据规模、模型规模、指数位、尾数位和块大小。

contrib.en: Discovers that exponent bits contribute slightly more to model performance than mantissa bits, providing optimal bit ratios for hardware.
contrib.zh: 发现指数位对模型性能的贡献略大于尾数位，为硬件提供了最优的指尾位比。

contrib.en: Identifies a critical data size in low-precision LLM training, beyond which performance degrades.
contrib.zh: 识别出低精度大语言模型训练中的临界数据量，超过该数据量后性能会下降。

contrib.en: Estimates the optimal cost-performance precision lies between 4-8 bits for a wide range of compute budgets.
contrib.zh: 估计在广泛的计算预算范围内，最优性价比精度介于4-8比特之间。

contrib.en: Validates the scaling law on 1.2B parameter models, showing accurate loss prediction.
contrib.zh: 在12亿参数模型上验证了缩放定律，显示出准确的损失预测。

contrib.en: Provides insights on quantization targets and block size effects for practical LLM training.
contrib.zh: 为实际大语言模型训练提供了关于量化目标和块大小影响的见解。

limits.en: Experiments limited to LLaMA architecture; applicability to other architectures like Mamba not verified.
limits.zh: 实验仅限于LLaMA架构，未验证对其他架构（如Mamba）的适用性。

limits.en: Scaling law derived from models up to 679M parameters; larger scales may require further validation.
limits.zh: 缩放定律基于最大6.79亿参数的模型推导，更大规模可能需要进一步验证。

limits.en: Focuses on classical floating-point quantization; newer low-bit methods not covered.
limits.zh: 专注于经典浮点量化，未涵盖更新的低位量化方法。

limits.en: Simulated floating-point formats may not fully reflect hardware behavior.
limits.zh: 模拟的浮点格式可能无法完全反映硬件行为。

limits.en: Critical data size and optimal precision estimates depend on fitted parameters; may vary with different datasets.
limits.zh: 临界数据量和最优精度估计依赖于拟合参数，可能因数据集不同而变化。

items.en: Low-precision training is considered an effective strategy for reducing both training and downstream inference costs. Previous scaling laws for precision mainly focus on integer quantization, which pay less attention to the constituents in floating-point quantization and thus cannot well fit the LLM losses in this scenario. In contrast, while floating-point quantization training is more commonly implemented in production, the research on it has been relatively superficial. In this paper, we thoroughly explore the effects of floating-point quantization targets, exponent bits, mantissa bits, and the calculation granularity of the scaling factor in floating-point quantization training performance of LLM models. While presenting an accurate floating-point quantization unified scaling law, we also provide valuable suggestions for the community: (1) Exponent bits contribute slightly more to the model performance than mantissa bits. We provide the optimal exponent-mantissa bit ratio for different bit numbers, which is available for future reference by hardware manufacturers; (2) We discover the formation of the critical data size in low-precision LLM training. Too much training data exceeding the critical data size will inversely bring in degradation of LLM performance; (3) The optimal floating-point quantization precision is directly proportional to the computational power, but within a wide computational power range, we estimate that the best cost-performance precision lies between 4-8 bits.
items.zh: 低精度训练被认为是降低训练和下游推理成本的有效策略。以往的精度缩放定律主要关注整数量化，较少关注浮点量化中的组成部分，因此无法很好地拟合该场景下大语言模型的损失。相比之下，浮点量化训练在生产中更为常见，但相关研究相对浅显。本文深入探讨了浮点量化目标、指数位、尾数位以及缩放因子计算粒度对大语言模型浮点量化训练性能的影响。在提出精确的浮点量化统一缩放定律的同时，我们为社区提供了有价值的建议：(1) 指数位对模型性能的贡献略大于尾数位。我们给出了不同比特数下的最优指数-尾数比特比，可供硬件制造商未来参考；(2) 我们发现了低精度大语言模型训练中关键数据量的形成。超过关键数据量的过多训练数据反而会导致大语言模型性能下降；(3) 最优浮点量化精度与算力成正比，但在较宽的算力范围内，我们估计最佳性价比精度在4-8比特之间。

items.en: The various scaling laws of large language models (LLMs) could help developers effectively select superior parameter settings before experiments and accurately predict the model performance under different configurations, which are regarded as excellent guidance in LLM training. The widely acknowledged scaling law efforts such as Kaplan et al. (2020), Hoffmann et al. (2022), and Li et al. (2024) mainly concentrate on the central factors, i.e., model size and trained token size, which significantly impact the performance of LLMs. With the rapid growth of both model and data sizes, there has been increasing attention to the efficiency and cost of LLM training. Training and serving with lower precision becomes a popular solution. Currently, lots of representative LLMs are trained in BF16 and even lower precision (Dubey et al., 2024; Sun et al., 2024; Liu et al., 2024; Yang et al., 2024; Ma et al., 2024; Wang et al., 2023; Peng et al., 2023), aiming to balance effectiveness and efficiency. Compared to integer quantization, floating-point (FP) quantization can better maintain LLMs’ accuracy at extremely lower bit rates and thus is often equipped in low-precision LLMs. Therefore, exploring the scaling laws of LLM performance under different low precision settings with floating-point quantization becomes essential to shed light on future low-precision LLM training.
items.zh: 大语言模型的各种缩放定律可以帮助开发者在实验前有效选择优越的参数设置，并准确预测不同配置下的模型性能，被视为大语言模型训练的极佳指导。广泛认可的缩放定律工作如Kaplan等人(2020)、Hoffmann等人(2022)和Li等人(2024)主要关注核心因素，即模型大小和训练词元大小，这些因素显著影响大语言模型的性能。随着模型和数据规模的快速增长，大语言模型训练的效率和成本越来越受到关注。以较低精度进行训练和服务成为一种流行解决方案。目前，许多代表性的大语言模型采用BF16甚至更低精度进行训练（Dubey等人，2024；Sun等人，2024；Liu等人，2024；Yang等人，2024；Ma等人，2024；Wang等人，2023；Peng等人，2023），旨在平衡效果和效率。与整数量化相比，浮点量化能在极低比特率下更好地保持大语言模型的准确性，因此常用于低精度大语言模型。因此，探索不同低精度设置下浮点量化的大语言模型性能缩放定律，对于指导未来低精度大语言模型训练至关重要。

items.en: Recently, there is pioneer work that conducts in-depth analyses and explorations on the LLM’s scaling laws for precision in both training and inference (Kumar et al., 2024), quantitatively measuring the degradation rules of post-train quantization and quantized training. This scaling law provides an appropriate conclusion explaining the potential damage of excessively increasing training data to low-precision LLMs’ performance. However, Kumar et al. (2024) directly adopts the bit width as the precision in its low-precision scaling laws, which may lose finer-grained modeling of the relationship between various parameter settings related to the FP quantization and the final loss of LLMs. In practice, the key factors of FP quantization such as the exponent, mantissa, and the block size of scaling factors may have different impacts on the final loss. A more comprehensive, precise, and practical scaling law for float quantized training related to the data size (D), model size (N), exponent (E), mantissa (M), and block size of scaling factors (B) is urgently desired.
items.zh: 最近，有先驱工作对大语言模型在训练和推理中的精度缩放定律进行了深入分析和探索（Kumar等人，2024），定量衡量了后训练量化和量化训练的退化规律。该缩放定律提供了适当的结论，解释了过度增加训练数据对低精度大语言模型性能的潜在损害。然而，Kumar等人(2024)在其低精度缩放定律中直接采用位宽作为精度，这可能丢失了对浮点量化相关各种参数设置与大语言模型最终损失之间关系的更细粒度建模。实践中，浮点量化的关键因素如指数、尾数和缩放因子的块大小可能对最终损失产生不同影响。迫切需要一种更全面、精确且实用的浮点量化训练缩放定律，涉及数据量(D)、模型大小(N)、指数(E)、尾数(M)和缩放因子块大小(B)。

items.en: Our work concentrates on establishing, verifying, and analyzing the scaling law for float quantized training in LLMs. At the beginning, we first predict the model performance via the precision-related scaling law from previous work under different data/model sizes and precision settings. Surprisingly, we discover that the predictive performance was not perfectly satisfactory under different float quantized training settings. Subsequently, we carefully design a comprehensive set of explorations with experiments of different precision settings (training 366 models), exploring the basic scaling law formation, as well as the potential impact of the quantization targets, exponent and mantissa, and block sizes on the loss. Finally, we aggregate these factors to get our final scaling law for float quantized training with valuable insights to guide the LLM training under low precision. Our scaling law is formulated as follows:
items.zh: 我们的工作致力于建立、验证和分析大语言模型中浮点量化训练的缩放定律。首先，我们通过先前工作中与精度相关的缩放定律，在不同数据/模型大小和精度设置下预测模型性能。令人惊讶的是，我们发现预测性能在不同浮点量化训练设置下并不十分令人满意。随后，我们精心设计了一系列探索性实验，包括不同精度设置（训练366个模型），探索基本缩放定律的形成，以及量化目标、指数和尾数、块大小对损失的潜在影响。最后，我们汇总这些因素，得到最终的浮点量化训练缩放定律，并给出有价值的见解，以指导低精度下的大语言模型训练。我们的缩放定律公式如下：

items.en: Current Scaling Laws cannot Well Fit in Floating-point Quantization. While most prior work has focused on integer quantized training, floating-point quantization is more prevalent in real-world applications due to its hardware compatibility and finer granularity. For instance, formats such as FP16 and BF16 are standard in many large-scale training pipelines, and emerging formats like FP8 and FP4 are gaining traction. Despite this, scaling laws specifically tailored to floating-point quantization are still largely unexplored. The primary distinction between floating-point and integer quantization lies in the allocation and usage of bits. Floating-point numbers allocate bits to represent both the exponent and the mantissa, with each set of bits serving distinct purposes: the exponent mainly captures dynamic range, while the mantissa mainly encodes precision within that range. In contrast, integer formats uniformly distribute all bits to refine the quantization lattice, providing consistent resolution across the representable range. This fundamental difference highlights the need for dedicated scaling laws for the unique characteristics of floating-point formats.
items.zh: 当前缩放定律无法很好地拟合浮点量化。虽然大多数先前工作关注整数量化训练，但浮点量化在实际应用中更为普遍，因其硬件兼容性和更细粒度。例如，FP16和BF16等格式是许多大规模训练流程的标准，而FP8和FP4等新兴格式正受到关注。尽管如此，专门针对浮点量化的缩放定律仍 largely unexplored。浮点量化与整数量化的主要区别在于比特的分配和使用。浮点数分配比特来表示指数和尾数，每组比特服务于不同目的：指数主要捕获动态范围，而尾数主要在该范围内编码精度。相比之下，整数格式均匀分配所有比特以细化量化网格，在可表示范围内提供一致的分辨率。这一根本差异凸显了为浮点格式的独特特性制定专用缩放定律的必要性。

items.en: However, upon conducting experiments and applying this scaling law to fit empirical results, particularly for low-precision training regimes, we observed significant deviations between the law’s predictions and actual performance, as illustrated in Figure 1. The unsatisfactory fit, especially for training results using low-bit floating-point formats, suggests that the previous proposed relationship in Kumar et al. (2024) does not adequately capture the nuanced dynamic impacts of floating-point quantization on LLM performance.
items.zh: 然而，通过实验并将此缩放定律拟合经验结果，特别是在低精度训练场景中，我们观察到定律预测与实际性能之间存在显著偏差，如图1所示。对于使用低位浮点格式的训练结果，拟合效果不理想，表明Kumar等人(2024)先前提出的关系未能充分捕捉浮点量化对大语言模型性能的细微动态影响。

items.en: In this work, we address these shortcomings by re-deriving the scaling law for floating-point quantized training. Our re-derivation incorporates a more nuanced understanding of how the finer factors of exponent, mantissa, and block size affect low-precision training. By refining the theoretical framework and aligning it more closely with observed behaviors, we aim to establish a more accurate and predictive scaling law that bridges the gap between theoretical insights and real-world applications.
items.zh: 在这项工作中，我们通过重新推导浮点量化训练的缩放定律来解决这些不足。我们的重新推导融入了对指数、尾数和块大小这些更精细因素如何影响低精度训练的更深理解。通过完善理论框架并使其更接近观察到的行为，我们旨在建立更准确且具有预测性的缩放定律，弥合理论见解与实际应用之间的差距。

items.en: We quantize a tensor into a low-precision floating-point format, following the IEEE 754 standard (Kahan, 1996), which includes both normal and subnormal representations. The format consists of a sign bit, EE exponent bits and MM mantissa bits. To expand the dynamic range, the special bits are adopted for normal values instead of representing Infinity and Not a Number (NaN). Since the modern hardware does not support arbitrary floating-point format, we simulate them using QPyTorch (Zhang et al., 2019) with nearest rounding.
items.zh: 我们按照IEEE 754标准（Kahan，1996）将张量量化为低精度浮点格式，该格式包括正规和次正规表示。该格式由符号位、EE个指数位和MM个尾数位组成。为了扩展动态范围，采用特殊位表示正规值，而不是表示无穷大和非数。由于现代硬件不支持任意浮点格式，我们使用QPyTorch（Zhang等人，2019）通过最近舍入进行模拟。

items.en: Due to the narrow dynamic range and low representation precision of the low-precision format, we employ scaling techniques (Sun et al., 2019; Micikevicius et al., 2022). items.en: The quantization is applied to the linear layers in transformer (Vaswani, 2017), excluding the dot-product attention and the classifier. The computation of a linear layer involves a matrix multiplication (Eq. (9)) during the forward phase and two matrix multiplications (Eq. (10) and Eq. (11)) during the backward phase.
items.zh: 量化应用于 Transformer（Vaswani, 2017）中的线性层，不包括点积注意力和分类器。线性层的计算在前向阶段涉及一次矩阵乘法（公式 (9)），在后向阶段涉及两次矩阵乘法（公式 (10) 和公式 (11)）。

items.en: where 𝐗∈ℝb×din\mathbf{X}\in\mathbb{R}^{b\times d_{\text{in}}}, 𝐖∈ℝdout×din\mathbf{W}\in\mathbb{R}^{d_{\text{out}}\times d_{\text{in}}} and 𝐘∈ℝb×dout\mathbf{Y}\in\mathbb{R}^{b\times d_{\text{out}}} represent the input tensor, the weight matrix and the output tensor, respectively. bb denotes the batch size, while dind_{\text{in}} and doutd_{\text{out}} refer to the number of input and output channels. The two inputs per matrix multiplication are converted into a low-precision format with scaling factors. The inputs are de-quantized into BF16 tensors (Abadi et al., 2016), and BF16 multiplication is performed. The accumulators are stored in FP32 format, and the result of the accumulators are converted into a BF16 tensor as the output.
items.zh: 其中 𝐗∈ℝb×din\mathbf{X}\in\mathbb{R}^{b\times d_{\text{in}}}、𝐖∈ℝdout×din\mathbf{W}\in\mathbb{R}^{d_{\text{out}}\times d_{\text{in}}} 和 𝐘∈ℝb×dout\mathbf{Y}\in\mathbb{R}^{b\times d_{\text{out}}} 分别表示输入张量、权重矩阵和输出张量。bb 表示批量大小，dind_{\text{in}} 和 doutd_{\text{out}} 分别表示输入和输出通道数。每次矩阵乘法的两个输入都使用缩放因子转换为低精度格式。输入被反量化为 BF16 张量（Abadi et al., 2016），并执行 BF16 乘法。累加器以 FP32 格式存储，累加器的结果转换为 BF16 张量作为输出。

items.en: We trained and evaluated a suite of LLaMA (Dubey et al., 2024) architecture models on a subset of the Dolma V1.7 dataset (Soldaini et al., 2024), maintaining the same sampling proportion used for training the OLMo 7B-v1.7 model (Groeneveld et al., 2024). Our experiments involved a systematic exploration of language model pretraining across N∈[41,85,154,679]N\in[41,85,154,679] million parameters and D∈[10,20,50,100]D\in[10,20,50,100] billion tokens. Additionally, we conducted two extra pretraining sessions with models containing 1.2 billion parameters to validate the accuracy of our scaling law equation.
items.zh: 我们在 Dolma V1.7 数据集（Soldaini et al., 2024）的子集上训练并评估了一系列 LLaMA（Dubey et al., 2024）架构模型，保持了与训练 OLMo 7B-v1.7 模型（Groeneveld et al., 2024）相同的采样比例。我们的实验系统性地探索了语言模型预训练，参数规模 N∈[41,85,154,679]N\in[41,85,154,679] 百万，数据量 D∈[10,20,50,100]D\in[10,20,50,100] 十亿 token。此外，我们还对包含 12 亿参数的模型进行了两次额外的预训练，以验证我们缩放定律方程的准确性。

items.en: For each combination of (N,D)(N,D), we executed over 36 runs, systematically sweeping through each exponent and mantissa combination, varying the quantization target during training, and exploring different block sizes for quantization. In total, we performed 366 runs. Detailed hyperparameters and ablation studies can be found in Table 1 and Table LABEL:tab:experiments.
items.zh: 对于每个 (N,D)(N,D) 组合，我们执行了超过 36 次运行，系统地遍历每个指数和尾数组合，改变训练期间的量化目标，并探索不同的量化块大小。总共进行了 366 次运行。详细的超参数和消融研究见表 1 和表 LABEL:tab:experiments。

items.en: Our research builds upon the foundational scaling laws for training data and model size, which are pivotal in understanding the efficiency and effectiveness of machine learning models. We first evaluate the classical scaling laws: the Chinchilla scaling law (Hoffmann et al., 2022) and the OpenAI scaling law (Kaplan et al., 2020), and then give the design of ours with precision-aware factors. To determine which scaling law better fits the empirical data, we conducted experiments using BF16 precision across a spectrum of model sizes ranging from 41 million to 679 million parameters. We plotted the resulting scaling law curves to visualize the fit between the predicted and actual losses.
items.zh: 我们的研究建立在训练数据和模型大小的基础缩放定律之上，这些定律对于理解机器学习模型的效率和有效性至关重要。我们首先评估了经典的缩放定律：Chinchilla 缩放定律（Hoffmann et al., 2022）和 OpenAI 缩放定律（Kaplan et al., 2020），然后给出了我们考虑精度因子的设计。为了确定哪种缩放定律更符合经验数据，我们使用 BF16 精度在 4100 万到 6.79 亿参数范围内进行了实验。我们绘制了得到的缩放定律曲线，以可视化预测损失和实际损失之间的拟合情况。

items.en: Given the superior fit of the Chinchilla scaling law in our BF16 precision experiments, we proceeded to use this law as the basis for further exploration into our proposed scaling law for float precision. Our aim is to extend the understanding of scaling laws to encompass the impact of numerical precision on model performance, particularly focusing on the trade-offs between precision, computational efficiency, and model accuracy. In the following sections, we will present our methodology for investigating the scaling law for float precision, the results of our experiments, and the implications of our findings for the design and training of machine learning models at various levels of numerical precision. The marginal effects of the exponent (E), the mantissa (M), and the size of the scaling factors (B) on the performance of LLM will be discussed with experiments.
items.zh: 鉴于 Chinchilla 缩放定律在我们的 BF16 精度实验中拟合效果更好，我们以此为基础，进一步探索我们提出的浮点精度缩放定律。我们的目标是扩展对缩放定律的理解，以涵盖数值精度对模型性能的影响，特别关注精度、计算效率和模型准确性之间的权衡。在接下来的章节中，我们将介绍我们研究浮点精度缩放定律的方法、实验结果，以及我们的发现对设计和训练不同数值精度水平的机器学习模型的启示。我们将通过实验讨论指数 (E)、尾数 (M) 和缩放因子大小 (B) 对 LLM 性能的边际影响。

items.en: In our pursuit of balancing practicality with academic rigor, we have chosen to focus on the quantization of inputs to the General Matrix Multiplication (GEMM) computations within the Transformer architecture. Transformer consists of three main GEMM operations: forward computation, input gradient computation, and parameter gradient computation. The inputs to these matrix multiplications in both forward and backward passes include six distinct elements: 𝐗\mathbf{X}, 𝐖\mathbf{W}, d​𝐘1{\mathrm{d}\mathbf{Y}_{1}}, 𝐖bwd{\mathbf{W}_{\text{bwd}}}, d​𝐘2\mathrm{d}\mathbf{Y}_{2}, and 𝐗bwd\mathbf{X}_{\text{bwd}}, which can be quantized to (P1P_{1}) through (P6P_{6}) respectively (see Figure 3).
items.zh: 为了在实用性和学术严谨性之间取得平衡，我们选择专注于 Transformer 架构中通用矩阵乘法（GEMM）计算的输入量化。Transformer 包含三个主要的 GEMM 操作：前向计算、输入梯度计算和参数梯度计算。前向和后向传播中这些矩阵乘法的输入包括六个不同的元素：𝐗\mathbf{X}、𝐖\mathbf{W}、d​𝐘1{\mathrm{d}\mathbf{Y}_{1}}、𝐖bwd{\mathbf{W}_{\text{bwd}}}、d​𝐘2\mathrm{d}\mathbf{Y}_{2} 和 𝐗bwd\mathbf{X}_{\text{bwd}}，它们可以分别量化为 (P1P_{1}) 到 (P6P_{6})（见图 3）。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Quantization Targets. We select P2, P4, and P6 as our quantization targets for the following exploration of scaling laws.
items.capZh: 图 3：量化目标。我们选择 P2、P4 和 P6 作为后续缩放定律探索的量化目标。

items.en: The quantization of P1, P3, and P5 has a significant effect on the model’s performance, leading to a substantial increase in loss. Notably, the quantization of P5 results in a pronounced degradation of performance, with losses increasing by up to 2%. This suggests that compressing and losing information in the input embedding during the backward pass can lead to considerable performance penalties.
items.zh: P1、P3 和 P5 的量化对模型性能有显著影响，导致损失大幅增加。值得注意的是，P5 的量化导致性能明显下降，损失增加高达 2%。这表明在后向传播中压缩和丢失输入嵌入的信息会导致相当大的性能损失。

items.en: Quantizing only one target of P4 or P6 yields the optimal performance.
items.zh: 仅量化 P4 或 P6 中的一个目标可获得最佳性能。

items.en: Quantizing both P2 and P6 together results in similar overall performance to quantizing P2 alone. Quantizing P2, P4, and P6 together also leads to overall results comparable to quantizing P2 alone.
items.zh: 同时量化 P2 和 P6 的整体性能与单独量化 P2 相似。同时量化 P2、P4 和 P6 的整体结果也与单独量化 P2 相当。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Results of loss gaps with different quantization targets.
items.capZh: 图 4：不同量化目标的损失差距结果。

items.en: To strike a balance between efficiency and effectiveness, we have opted to quantize P2, P4, and P6. Subsequent research into float precision quantization will be based on this configuration. This decision is informed by the minimal impact on performance observed when quantizing these particular inputs, as opposed to the significant degradation caused by quantizing others. By focusing on P2, P4, and P6, we aim to maintain the integrity of the model’s performance while reaping the computational benefits of quantization.
items.zh: 为了在效率和效果之间取得平衡，我们选择量化 P2、P4 和 P6。后续关于浮点精度量化的研究将基于此配置。这一决定是基于观察到量化这些特定输入对性能的影响最小，而量化其他输入则会导致显著退化。通过专注于 P2、P4 和 P6，我们旨在保持模型性能的完整性，同时获得量化的计算优势。

items.en: The exponent and mantissa are key components of floating-point representations. Appropriately assigning bit widths to exponent and mantissa will larger alleviate information loss in floating-point quantization. In this subsection, we attempt to discover the hidden rules between exponent/mantissa and the LLM performance.
items.zh: 指数和尾数是浮点数表示的关键组成部分。适当分配指数和尾数的位宽将更大程度地减少浮点量化中的信息损失。在本小节中，我们试图发现指数/尾数与LLM性能之间的隐藏规律。

items.en: Firstly, we investigate the scaling law when Exponent serves as an independent variable. Experiments of different Exponents with various other parameter settings have been conducted, followed by our attempt of parameter fitting. It is assumed that the Exponent-related scaling law conforms more to a power-law relationship form as:
items.zh: 首先，我们研究当指数作为自变量时的缩放定律。我们进行了不同指数及其他参数设置的实验，随后尝试进行参数拟合。假设与指数相关的缩放定律更符合幂律关系形式：

items.en: We discussed other forms of relationships (e.g., Kumar et al. (2024)) and conducted relevant comparative experiments, ultimately finding that the power-law relationship is more consistent with the experimental results. The 0.50.5 in Eq. (12) functions as a good bias to fit extreme values. According to the IEEE 754 standard (Kahan, 1996), when either E (exponent) or M (mantissa) is set to 0, a default information is still retained. This can also account for the existence of a half-bit bias here.
items.zh: 我们讨论了其他形式的关系（例如，Kumar等人(2024)），并进行了相关对比实验，最终发现幂律关系与实验结果更为一致。公式(12)中的0.5作为偏置项能很好地拟合极值。根据IEEE 754标准(Kahan, 1996)，当E（指数）或M（尾数）设置为0时，仍保留默认信息。这也可以解释此处存在半位偏置的原因。

items.en: Next, we attempt to fuse the relationship of E with those of data size D and model size N. Parameter fitting is carried out under various E, D, and N configurations, and the results are shown in Figure 5, where γ\gamma is negatively correlated with DN\frac{D}{N}, and ι\iota is negatively correlated with both NN and DD. With regard to γ\gamma, we re-parameterize it as a function of Dϕγ​Nη\frac{D^{\phi}}{\gamma N^{\eta}}. As for ι\iota, simply multiplying the original form of the chinchilla scaling law by a coefficient precisely satisfies the pattern we discovered. Subsequently, we fit L​(N,D,E)L(N,D,E), which is the jointly scaling law of N, D, E, as follows:
items.zh: 接下来，我们尝试将E的关系与数据大小D和模型大小N的关系融合。我们在不同的E、D和N配置下进行参数拟合，结果如图5所示，其中γ与D/N负相关，ι与N和D均负相关。对于γ，我们将其重新参数化为D^φ/(γN^η)的函数。对于ι，简单地将Chinchilla缩放定律的原始形式乘以一个系数即可精确满足我们发现的模式。随后，我们拟合L(N,D,E)，即N、D、E的联合缩放定律，如下所示：

items.en: LB​F​16L_{BF16} represents the BF16 loss L​(N,D)L(N,D) given in the chinchilla scaling law of Eq. (2), i.e, LB​F​16=nNα+dDβ+ϵL_{BF16}=\frac{n}{N^{\alpha}}+\frac{d}{D^{\beta}}+\epsilon. Elegantly, we find that ϕ≈β\phi\approx\beta, η≈α\eta\approx\alpha, and ι≈1\iota\approx 1 in the fitting. Therefore, the Exponent scaling law is as:
items.zh: L_BF16表示Chinchilla缩放定律公式(2)中给出的BF16损失L(N,D)，即L_BF16 = n/N^α + d/D^β + ε。优雅的是，我们在拟合中发现φ≈β，η≈α，ι≈1。因此，指数缩放定律为：

items.en: Finally, we re-fit the data using Eq 14, obtaining the results shown in Figure 6.
items.zh: 最后，我们使用公式(14)重新拟合数据，得到的结果如图6所示。

items.capEn: Figure 6: The fitting results of our Exponent-related scaling law. Data point size is proportional to DD.
items.capZh: 图6：我们与指数相关的缩放定律的拟合结果。数据点大小与D成正比。

items.en: Similar to Exponent, we also assume the Mantissa-related scaling law conforms a power-law form as:
items.zh: 与指数类似，我们也假设与尾数相关的缩放定律符合幂律形式：

items.en: Jointly considering the effects of D and N in representing γ′\gamma^{\prime} and ι′\iota^{\prime}, we have:
items.zh: 联合考虑D和N在表示γ'和ι'中的影响，我们有：

items.en: Surprisingly, we also find that ϕ′≈β\phi^{\prime}\approx\beta, η′≈α\eta^{\prime}\approx\alpha, and ι′≈1\iota^{\prime}\approx 1. Ultimately, we adopt the form of Eq. (17) to fit the joint scaling law of Mantissa with NN and DD.
items.zh: 令人惊讶的是，我们还发现φ'≈β，η'≈α，ι'≈1。最终，我们采用公式(17)的形式来拟合尾数与N和D的联合缩放定律。

items.capEn: Figure 7: The fitting results of our Mantissa-related scaling law. Data point size is proportional to DD.
items.capZh: 图7：我们与尾数相关的缩放定律的拟合结果。数据点大小与D成正比。

items.en: Integrating the scaling law results of Exponent and Mantissa when each serves as an independent variable, we can naturally organize their joint scaling law with N, D, E, M into the form of Eq. (18). The final fitting effect is presented in Figure 8.
items.zh: 综合指数和尾数各自作为自变量时的缩放定律结果，我们可以自然地将它们与N、D、E、M的联合缩放定律整理为公式(18)的形式。最终的拟合效果见图8。

items.en: In this subsection, we discuss the correlations of the block sizes and LLM losses, and extend the block-related scaling law to channel-wise and tensor-wise strategies.
items.zh: 在本小节中，我们讨论块大小与LLM损失的相关性，并将与块相关的缩放定律扩展到通道级和张量级策略。

items.en: In the quantization process, we define the statistical range of the scaling factor as the block size (B). Since the scaling factor employs high-precision caching, when B=1B=1, it is equivalent to retaining a high-precision copy of the tensor to be quantized. At this point, the model’s expressiveness should be approximately the same as that of the high-precision model: L​(N,D,B=1)≈LB​F​16​(N,D)L(N,D,B=1)\approx L_{BF16}(N,D). After comparing the power, linear, and logarithmic law forms, we ultimately select the following logarithmic form as the scaling law when block size serves as an independent variable:
items.zh: 在量化过程中，我们将缩放因子的统计范围定义为块大小（B）。由于缩放因子采用高精度缓存，当B=1时，相当于保留待量化张量的高精度副本。此时，模型的表达能力应与高精度模型大致相同：L(N,D,B=1)≈L_BF16(N,D)。在比较了幂律、线性和对数律形式后，我们最终选择以下对数形式作为块大小作为自变量时的缩放定律：

items.en: In Figure 9, we demonstrate the changes in fitted κ\kappa and ψ\psi under different N and D conditions. It can be observed that, similar to the exploration of Exponent and Mantissa in Section 3.5, κ\kappa is positively correlated with DN\frac{D}{N}, while ψ\psi is negatively correlated with NN and DD, respectively. Furthermore, after re-parameterizing them, we similarly found that the fitted exponents of NN and DD are approximately α\alpha and β\beta, and the correction coefficient of ψ\psi based on the chinchilla scaling law is approximately equal to 1. Therefore, we ultimately build the scaling law for block size in conjunction with NN and DD as follows:
items.zh: 在图9中，我们展示了在不同N和D条件下拟合的κ和ψ的变化。可以观察到，与第3.5节中对指数和尾数的探索类似，κ与D/N正相关，而ψ分别与N和D负相关。此外，在重新参数化后，我们同样发现N和D的拟合指数近似为α和β，并且基于Chinchilla缩放定律的ψ修正系数约等于1。因此，我们最终结合N和D构建了块大小的缩放定律如下：

items.en: We demonstrate its fitting effect on experimental data in Figure 10.
items.zh: 我们在图10中展示了其在实验数据上的拟合效果。

items.en: To investigate the scaling law under the channel-wise strategy, we first utilize Eq. (20) to inversely derive the equivalent block size for different N and D cases that achieve the same validation loss as when employing the channel-wise strategy. It is found that this equivalent block size of the channel-wise strategy is approximately a constant:
items.zh: 为了研究通道策略下的缩放定律，我们首先利用公式(20)反推出在不同N和D情况下，达到与使用通道策略时相同验证损失所需的等效块大小。发现该通道策略的等效块大小近似为一个常数：

items.en: which is natural since the batch size of gradient is (mostly) much larger than the hidden size (di​nd_{in} in Section 3.1.1). After incorporating this equivalent block size into Eq. (20), the fitted scenario of the channel-wise strategy is in Figure 11.
items.zh: 这是自然的，因为梯度的批量大小（大部分）远大于隐藏层大小（第3.1.1节中的d_in）。在将该等效块大小代入公式(20)后，通道策略的拟合情况如图11所示。

items.capEn: Figure 11: The fitting results of the channel-wise scaling law. The size of the data point is proportional to DD.
items.capZh: 图11：通道缩放定律的拟合结果。数据点的大小与D成正比。

items.en: When adopting the tensor-wise strategy, we similarly employ Eq. (20) to predict its the equivalent block size. As illustrated in Figure 12, the equivalent block size satisfies a power-law like relationship with ND\frac{N}{D} as follows:
items.zh: 当采用张量策略时，我们同样使用公式(20)来预测其等效块大小。如图12所示，等效块大小与N/D满足幂律关系如下：

items.capZh: 图12：log₂B与N/D之间的相关性。数据点的大小与D成正比。

full.sec: 4 A Unified Scaling Law for Floating–Point Quantization Training
full.secZh: 4 浮点量化训练的统一缩放律

items.en: In Section 3, we have decided the basic scaling law form and quantization targets in this work, followed by detailed explorations on the marginal effects of critical factors (i.e., the exponent, the mantissa, and the block size) on LLM capabilities. In this section, we will provide the unified scaling law for floating-point quantization training, with its fitting and predictive performance as well as the insightful findings deriving from our scaling law.
items.zh: 在第3节中，我们确定了本研究中的基本缩放定律形式和量化目标，随后详细探讨了关键因素（即指数、尾数和块大小）对LLM能力的边际影响。在本节中，我们将提供浮点量化训练的统一缩放定律，包括其拟合和预测性能，以及从我们的缩放定律中得出的深刻发现。

items.en: The unified scaling law for floating-point quantization training should be able to jointly consider all factors of the data size (D), model size (N), exponent (E), mantissa (M), and block size of scaling factors (B) for precise low-precision LLM performance prediction. Based on the conclusions drawn in Eq. (2), Eq. (18), and Eq. (20), we could intuitively design the unified scaling law as follows:
items.zh: 浮点量化训练的统一缩放定律应能联合考虑数据大小（D）、模型大小（N）、指数（E）、尾数（M）和缩放因子的块大小（B）所有因素，以精确预测低精度LLM的性能。基于公式(2)、公式(18)和公式(20)得出的结论，我们可以直观地设计统一缩放定律如下：

items.en: Here, nNα+dDβ+ϵ\frac{n}{N^{\alpha}}+\frac{d}{D^{\beta}}+\epsilon represents the classical BF16 loss of the Chinchilla scaling law, and ρ​(E,M,B)\rho(E,M,B) indicates the additional negative impacts brought by low-precision float quantized training. Deriving from Eq. (18) and (20), we can formulate as follows:
items.zh: 这里，n/N^α + d/D^β + ε代表Chinchilla缩放定律的经典BF16损失，而ρ(E,M,B)表示低精度浮点量化训练带来的额外负面影响。由公式(18)和(20)推导，我们可以将其表述为：

items.en: where the exponent E, mantissa M, and block size B jointly represent the possible information loss of float quantized training, and DβNα\frac{D^{\beta}}{N^{\alpha}} reflects, in a sense, the knowledge intensity of an LLM of size N trained on D data. Note that we could smoothly fuse the factors of E, M, and B with a unified set of hyper-parameters of α\alpha, β\beta, and γ\gamma.
items.zh: 其中指数E、尾数M和块大小B共同表示浮点量化训练可能的信息损失，而D^β/N^α在某种意义上反映了在D数据上训练的规模为N的LLM的知识密度。注意，我们可以通过一组统一的超参数α、β和γ平滑地融合E、M和B的因素。

full.sec: 4.3 Implication-2: Critical Data Size for Optimal Performance
full.secZh: 4.3 启示二：最优性能的关键数据量

items.capEn: Figure 16: Variation of loss with data size under different floating-point quantization settings.
items.capZh: 图16：不同浮点量化设置下损失随数据量的变化。

items.en: From Eq. (25) and Fig 16, we can observe that there are two factors containing DD that have opposite impacts on LLM loss. Intuitively, it implies that there is an optimal data size under a certain float-pointing quantization setting. The determination of critical data size (Dc​r​i​tD_{crit}) stands as a critical juncture within the quantized training regimen. Upon exceeding the threshold of Dc​r​i​tD_{crit} with the training dataset, any additional data introduction negatively impacts the model efficacy, manifesting in a rise in validation loss instead of a decline. A comprehensive derivation for the estimation of Dc​r​i​tD_{crit} is delineated in Appendix B:
items.zh: 从式(25)和图16可以看出，有两个包含DD的因素对LLM损失产生相反的影响。直观上，这意味着在特定的浮点量化设置下存在一个最优数据量。临界数据量（Dc​r​i​tD_{crit}）的确定是量化训练方案中的一个关键节点。当训练数据集超过Dc​r​i​tD_{crit}阈值时，任何额外的数据引入都会对模型效果产生负面影响，表现为验证损失上升而非下降。关于Dc​r​i​tD_{crit}估计的详细推导见附录B：

items.en: Notably, a positive correlation emerges between model size (NN) or training precision (PP) and the occurrence of this pivotal point, indicating its delayed emergence under such conditions. Utilizing our parameter estimation framework, a 1 billion-parameter model trained utilizing BF16 exhibits a Dc​r​i​tD_{crit} value of 1730T, which is much larger than our current data size, elucidating the previous lack of observation of this phenomenon. Conversely, when the same model is trained with FP8-E4M3, the Dc​r​i​tD_{crit} value swiftly diminishes to 27T, and with FP4-E2M1, it further plummets to 0.4T. This phenomenon implies the potential harmness of larger data size on low-precision LLM training.
items.zh: 值得注意的是，模型大小（NN）或训练精度（PP）与该关键点的出现呈正相关，表明在这些条件下其出现会延迟。利用我们的参数估计框架，使用BF16训练的10亿参数模型的Dc​r​i​tD_{crit}值为1730T，远大于我们当前的数据量，这解释了之前未观察到这一现象的原因。相反，当同一模型使用FP8-E4M3训练时，Dc​r​i​tD_{crit}值迅速降至27T，而使用FP4-E2M1时，进一步骤降至0.4T。这一现象表明，更大的数据量可能对低精度LLM训练有害。

items.en: which consolidates the relationships between model precision and compute efficiency. As illustrated in Figure 17, Eq. (30) suggests that as the amount of training data increases, the most economical precision also correspondingly rises under the constraint of limited computational power. This also suggests that we can adopt such a quantization strategy: in the early stage of training, employ aggressive quantization strategies such as FP8-E4M3, or even FP4-E2M1 which may be available in the future hardware, so as to quickly converge the model to a better level. Subsequently, as the data volume as well as the “knowledge intensity” further increase, gradually enhance the training precision to BF16, or even FP32, in order to maintain the optimal cost-effectiveness of training.
items.zh: 这整合了模型精度与计算效率之间的关系。如图17所示，式(30)表明，随着训练数据量的增加，在有限算力约束下，最经济的精度也相应提高。这也表明我们可以采用这样的量化策略：在训练初期，采用激进的量化策略，如FP8-E4M3，甚至未来硬件可能支持的FP4-E2M1，以快速将模型收敛到更好的水平。随后，随着数据量以及“知识密度”的进一步增加，逐步提高训练精度至BF16，甚至FP32，以保持训练的最佳成本效益。

items.en: Due to the extremely large cost of resource and time for LLM training, discovering appropriate scaling laws to accurately predict LLM capabilities under different parameters is essential for product-level training. Kaplan et al. (2020) gives the classic form of the scaling law and concludes that the performance penalty depends predictably on the ratio N0.74/DN^{0.74}/D. Hoffmann et al. (2022) models the final loss as a parametric function of the count of model parameters and the number of trained tokens, i.e. E+A/Nα+B/DβE+A/N^{\alpha}+B/D^{\beta}. Bahri et al. (2024) and Lin et al. (2024) theoretical analysis of how loss scales with the size of the training dataset and the number of parameters in a power-law manner. Previous work (Dettmers & Zettlemoyer, 2023) explores the scaling laws of LLMs with different bit precisions. Recently, Kumar et al. (2024) focuses on the impact of model parameters and data volume with low precision, highlighting the possible negative impacts of more trained tokens in low-precision LLM training and serving. Other recent work (Ouyang et al., 2024) also investigate the correlations of integer quantization and LLM performance. Nevertheless, it is still not that particularly clear to conclude the scaling law for floating-point quantization training with respect to the specific selection of the exponent, mantissa, and block size of scaling factors.
items.zh: 由于LLM训练的资源和时间成本极高，发现合适的缩放定律以准确预测不同参数下LLM的能力对于产品级训练至关重要。Kaplan等人(2020)给出了缩放定律的经典形式，并得出结论：性能损失可预测地取决于比率N0.74/DN^{0.74}/D。Hoffmann等人(2022)将最终损失建模为模型参数数量和训练token数量的参数函数，即E+A/Nα+B/DβE+A/N^{\alpha}+B/D^{\beta}。Bahri等人(2024)和Lin等人(2024)从理论上分析了损失如何以幂律方式随训练数据集大小和参数数量缩放。先前的工作(Dettmers & Zettlemoyer, 2023)探索了不同比特精度下LLM的缩放定律。最近，Kumar等人(2024)关注了低精度下模型参数和数据量的影响，强调了在低精度LLM训练和服务中更多训练token可能带来的负面影响。其他近期工作(Ouyang等人, 2024)也研究了整数量化与LLM性能的相关性。然而，关于浮点量化训练中指数、尾数和缩放因子块大小的具体选择，目前仍不十分清楚如何总结缩放定律。

items.en: The quantization technique of large language models (Lang et al., 2024; Shen et al., 2024) has received widespread attention. Xiao et al. (2023) reduces the accuracy loss during quantization by smoothing the distribution of activations and weights. Dettmers et al. (2024) combines Quantization-Aware Training and LoRA methods to implement an efficient fine-tuning method. Egiazarian et al. (2024) explores techniques for compressing large language models at very low bit rates, and Behdin et al. (2023) proposes a framework that allows each layer to be quantized independently. Although previous work (Zhang et al., 2023; Yoshida, 2023) have studied the impact of exponent, mantissa and blocksize on the quantification of LLMs, the comprehensive impact of these indicators has not been systematically studied and summarized.
items.zh: 大语言模型的量化技术(Lang等人, 2024; Shen等人, 2024)受到了广泛关注。Xiao等人(2023)通过平滑激活和权重的分布来减少量化过程中的精度损失。Dettmers等人(2024)结合了量化感知训练和LoRA方法，实现了一种高效的微调方法。Egiazarian等人(2024)探索了在极低比特率下压缩大语言模型的技术，Behdin等人(2023)提出了一个允许每层独立量化的框架。尽管先前的工作(Zhang等人, 2023; Yoshida, 2023)已经研究了指数、尾数和块大小对LLM量化的影响，但这些指标的综合影响尚未被系统研究和总结。

items.en: In this work, we propose our scaling law for floating-point quantization training, which functions satisfactorily as a precise guidance of future low-precision LLM training. The key factors of the data size (D), model size (N), exponent (E), mantissa (M), and block size of scaling factors (B) are carefully considered in our scaling law throughout several hundred of experiments with various precision and model settings. Besides the scaling law, we also discover some insightful implications that could instruct and enhance future floating-point quantization training in LLMs. We hope our findings could shed light on better low-prediction LLM training to facilitate the LLM community.
items.zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了针对浮点量化训练的缩放定律，该定律能够很好地作为未来低精度LLM训练的精确指导。数据量（D）、模型大小（N）、指数（E）、尾数（M）和缩放因子块大小（B）等关键因素在我们的缩放定律中得到了仔细考虑，我们进行了数百次不同精度和模型设置的实验。除了缩放定律，我们还发现了一些有洞察力的启示，可以指导并增强未来LLM中的浮点量化训练。我们希望我们的发现能够为更好的低精度LLM训练提供启示，从而促进LLM社区的发展。

items.en: In the future, we will verify our scaling laws for floating-point quantization training under larger model sizes and data sizes. Currently, our explorations are conducted based on the classical Transformer architecture. Whether our scaling laws could also be smoothly applied to LLMs of other architectures (e.g., Mamba series (Dao & Gu, 2024)) is worth confirming. Moreover, our experiments focus on the classical floating-point quantization strategies, while other new-proposed low-bit LLM quantization methods should also be covered in the future.
items.zh: 未来，我们将在更大的模型大小和数据量下验证我们的浮点量化训练缩放定律。目前，我们的探索基于经典的Transformer架构。我们的缩放定律是否也能顺利应用于其他架构的LLM（例如Mamba系列(Dao & Gu, 2024)）值得确认。此外，我们的实验集中于经典的浮点量化策略，而其他新提出的低比特LLM量化方法也应被涵盖在未来工作中。
